title: Genesis PATCH_REGISTRY entry
description: Schema for one entry in vllm/_genesis/dispatcher.py::PATCH_REGISTRY. Validates structural correctness and surfaces typos / missing fields before they hit a live boot. Used by tools/validate_patch_registry.py and the pre-commit hook.

title.description: Short human-readable name. Shown in dispatcher matrix + doctor + explain.

env_flag.description: Master env variable. Must start with 'GENESIS_ENABLE_' or be a shared family flag.

default_on.description: True = applies even when env unset. Default OFF for new patches; flip to True only after stable lifecycle + at least one PROD release.

lifecycle.description: Lifecycle state. New patches start as 'experimental'. Code removal requires prior 'retired' for at least one release. 'legacy' marks pre-dispatcher patches (P1-P46 series) that have been live in PROD before the registry existed; they have minimal metadata by design.

category.description: Free-form category for navigation / Phase 2 wiring/ subdir grouping.

credit.description: What + why. Long-form free text. Should mention upstream PR number, original author handle, and the bug class fixed. Genesis-original work credits Sandermage.

deprecation_note.description: Required when lifecycle == 'deprecated'. Explains why and what supersedes it.

experimental_note.description: Required when lifecycle == 'experimental'. Explains the unknown / risk.

research_note.description: Required when lifecycle == 'research'. Explains why kept as reference.

community_credit.description: Required when lifecycle == 'community'. Plugin origin / author.

stable_since.description: Genesis version where this patch reached stable lifecycle (e.g. 'v7.62.18').

since_version.description: Genesis version where this patch was first introduced.

deprecated_since.description: Genesis version where this patch became deprecated.

removal_planned.description: Genesis version where this patch will be removed (only valid with lifecycle == 'deprecated' or 'retired').

deprecated.description: DEPRECATED FIELD — legacy boolean. Use `lifecycle: deprecated` instead. Old entries still recognized via lifecycle.get_state() fallback.

superseded_by.description: Patch ID(s) that replace this one when deprecated.

upstream_pr.description: vllm-project/vllm PR number this patch backports. null = Genesis-original or no upstream tracker.

applies_to.description: Predicate that gates this patch by hardware / model / version. Either flat-dict legacy form (auto-normalized to all_of) or rich AND/OR/NOT/NONE_OF compound form. See compat/predicates.py.

requires_patches.description: Patch IDs that must also APPLY for this patch to make sense. Validated by A3/D2 validator at boot.

conflicts_with.description: Patch IDs that MUST NOT be applied at the same time. Validated by A3/D2 validator at boot.

wiring.description: Wiring module stem (e.g. 'patch_pr41674_thinking_budget_inverted_bool') implementing this patch. Present on text-patch/rebind patches dispatched by the generic apply_all._apply_wiring_entry executor; absent on hand-written outlier apply functions and metadata-only diagnostic entries.
